raw: {"perspective": "Scaling Engineer", "findings": [{"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "memory/atlas/identity.md", "issue": "Perspective weights in PERSPECTIVES array are all zeros — learning is inactive. Swarm evolution is static despite CEO authorization to expand.", "recommended_fix": "Activate learning loop: set non-zero initial weights, implement spawn_count persistence in federated memory layer, log to zeus.governance_events."}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/agents/", "issue": "Directory is empty — 13 registered perspectives exist as JSON only, no Python implementations. Leaderboards violate CRYSTAL LAW 5 (Collaborative > Zero-Sum).", "recommended_fix": "Explicitly ban all leaderboards in LAW 5 or CRYSTAL LAW 5 with cross-reference."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Swarm autonomy gap enables uncontrolled solo execution — violates Level 0 laws at scale."}

findings.issue: Perspective weights in PERSPECTIVES array are all zeros — learning is inactive. Swarm evolution is static despite CEO authorization to expand.
findings.recommended_fix: Activate learning loop: set non-zero initial weights, implement spawn_count persistence in federated memory layer, log to zeus.governance_events.

findings.issue: Directory is empty — 13 registered perspectives exist as JSON only, no Python implementations. Swarm is architectural fiction.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement agent runtimes per wave; start with Wave-0 (Firuza, Nigar, Security, Architecture, Product). Enforce spawn via Coordinator Agent before Class 3 solo execution.

findings.issue: Crystal Law 6 Amendment incomplete — bans contingent rewards but doesn't prohibit leaderboards. Leaderboards violate CRYSTAL LAW 5 (Collaborative > Zero-Sum).
findings.recommended_fix: Explicitly ban all leaderboards in LAW 5 or CRYSTAL LAW 5 with cross-reference.

whistleblower_flag: Swarm autonomy gap enables uncontrolled solo execution — violates Level 0 laws at scale.
